name: doc-summarizer-ai
description: Local document summarizer. Drag a doc, get an email-ready summary via Ask Sage.

comments.dependencies: Intentionally ZERO. Node 20.12+ provides fetch, FormData, Blob, and process.loadEnvFile() natively. Nothing to audit, no lockfile drift, no transitive CVEs in a CUI tool.
comments.history: v0.1 tried to be a single self-contained .html emailed to the user. That died when we confirmed Ask Sage returns no Access-Control-Allow-Origin, so a browser cannot call it directly. The API call now happens in this local Node process.
